log: REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Kobold — Armored Escapist.
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:17+3=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:1+-2=-1 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:3+-2=1 vs DC 15] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Kobold — Armored Escapist (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 20] HIT! 28 damage. Kobold — Armored Escapist HP: 31/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
